calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-15-2026 Continued To Jun-22-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Waiver Of Objections
Off Calendar May-06-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM WAIVER OF OBJECTIONS

Appearances via Zoom:
Robert Rogoyski of the Office of the City Attorney (415.554.4284, robert.rogoyski@sfcityatty.org) for defendant and moving party;
Ryan Stahl of Scherer Smith & Kenny LLP (415.433.1099) for plaintiff and opposing party.

Argued and the court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The City and County of San Francisco's motion for relief from its waiver of objections pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure, section 2031.300, is granted. The court finds that the City has shown that its failure to serve a timely response was the result of mistake, inadvertence, or excusable neglect. The court further finds that the City's responses substantially comply with the relevant statutes. Nothing in this order precludes Plaintiff from pursuing her contention that the responses are insufficient through meet and confer efforts or a discovery motion. Proposed order submitted for review. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-14-2026 Continued To Jun-15-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-13-2025 Continued To Mar-23-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion To Compel Responses And Document Production
Off Calendar Dec-13-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances
Atty. RYAN W. STAHL, Esq. of SMITH & KENNY LLP, (Tel: 415-433-1099) for Plaintiff.
Atty. LAUREN E. WOOD, Esq. of Deputy City Attorney Fox Plaza,(Tel: 415-554-4261) for Defendants (via Zoom videoconference).

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF RITA GURLEY's Motion To Compel Responses And Document Production.

Plaintiff Counsel contest portions of the Court's tentative ruling. Matter argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as modified for the defendant to complete responses and complete production no later than 30days from the proof of service of the order.

Plaintiff Rita Gurley, MD's Motion to Compel from Defendant City and County of San Francisco Further Responses to Request for Production of Documents is GRANTED IN PART AND DENED IN PART. The request for sanctions is DENIED.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order Signed. (see order for full details)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (301/JMQ)
